category_sources: LaunchDarkly official docs describe ld-find-code-refs as an open-source utility that scans code and pushes code reference information to LaunchDarkly.
source_facts.description says it is a build tool for sending feature flag code references to LaunchDarkly.
docs_sources: LaunchDarkly official documentation has a Code references page covering ld-find-code-refs.
Official GitHub repository README is an official project documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/launchdarkly/ld-find-code-refs, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: LaunchDarkly docs say the utility integrates into CI/CD and scans code references.
source_facts.description identifies LaunchDarkly feature flag code reference publishing.
